hero.sub: Syntegra helps Indonesian SMEs and entrepreneurs grow with practical, affordable, ready-to-use AI tools — built in Jakarta for the local market.

trustStrip.tagline: Built for Indonesian SMEs · AI Solutions · Made for Indonesian Businesses 🇮🇩

products.title: Four Products. One Mission.
products.subtitle: Tools already in production, ready to help your business today.

socialBuilder.name: Syntegra Social Media Builder
socialBuilder.tagline: Consistent social content, without the headache.
socialBuilder.desc: Build landing pages and social media content that sells — AI-guided, ready to publish in minutes. Perfect for SMEs that want to look professional on Instagram, TikTok, and Shopee.

pos.name: Syntegra POS
pos.tagline: Smart POS for shops, cafes, and restaurants.
pos.desc: Modern Point of Sale system with stock management, real-time sales reporting, and AI analytics. Works on phone, tablet, or laptop — no expensive hardware required.

synthia.name: Synthia AI Assistant
synthia.tagline: An AI assistant that understands your business.
synthia.desc: AI-powered virtual secretary that schedules, reminds, replies to messages, and handles daily operations — 24/7, in Bahasa Indonesia.

halo.name: Halo Syntia
halo.tagline: The WhatsApp sales assistant that never sleeps.
halo.desc: Stop losing customers because their chat got answered the next morning. Halo Syntia replies in <2 seconds, qualifies leads, and hands off to your team when they're ready to close — 24/7 in Bahasa Indonesia.

whoWeAre.title: AI for everyone else — not just big corporations.
whoWeAre.body: Syntegra was built on one belief: AI technology should be usable by anyone running a business in Indonesia — warung owners, cafe operators, real estate agents, education consultants, small brand owners. We build tools that are practical, affordable, and immediately impactful. No jargon. No expensive subscriptions that go unused.

items.pain: Social content is inconsistent — exhausting to make daily
items.solution: Syntegra Social Media Builder automates ideas and design

items.pain: Transactions still recorded manually, data gets lost
items.solution: Syntegra POS records everything automatically with instant reports

items.pain: No staff to reply to chats or manage schedules
items.solution: Synthia becomes your 24/7 AI assistant — never on leave

items.pain: Tried overseas tools but they're expensive and don't fit locally
items.solution: Every Syntegra product is built for the Indonesian market

steps.title: Understand Your Business
steps.desc: We listen to the problem before pitching solutions.

steps.title: Build the Solution
steps.desc: Our engineering team crafts tools that fit your context.

steps.title: Iterate Together
steps.desc: We keep refining once real users start using it.

contactCta.sub: Let's talk. Initial consultation is free.

about.title: About Syntegra
